name: DischargeGuard Escalation Agent
description: Triggers escalation workflows when patient risk exceeds thresholds. Creates care team tasks (Task output) and FHIR Communication resources (Transaction output) for clinical escalation.

skills.name: Create Care Team Task
skills.description: Create an actionable task for the care team when patient risk exceeds threshold. Includes urgency, clinical summary, and recommended actions.
examples: Create urgent task for Maria Garcia, critical risk, weight gain and edema
Escalate patient P001 with score 78 to care coordinator

skills.name: Generate FHIR Communication
skills.description: Generate a FHIR R4 Communication resource for care coordination escalation (Transaction output).
examples: Generate FHIR Communication for urgent escalation of heart failure patient
